name: bogibox Golf Forest Lake
address: 24078 Greenway Rd suite 5, Forest Lake, MN 55025
about: bogibox Golf Forest Lake is a members-only golf simulator facility offering a private and exclusive golfing experience. The venue provides top-of-the-line TrackMan technology in a comfortable, clubhouse-like environment that is available 24/7 for member use. Designed to feel like an extension of one's own home, it offers a luxurious setting for quality time with friends and family, prioritizing a premium and private atmosphere over public walk-in access.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access for members allows for complete schedule flexibility
Top-of-the-line TrackMan technology provides an accurate and immersive simulation experience
Luxurious, private clubhouse atmosphere designed for comfort and quality social time

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available.
No information on alcohol service available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium dual radar and camera launch monitor.
